title: Property Consultant - Brigade Group Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Brigade Group Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Brigade Group Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Property Consultant to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Brigade Group Ventures Solutions:
Brigade Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group Ventures Solutions!
